devdoc.author: Dark Pool Protocol
devdoc.details: Uses 14 distinct FHE operations: ge, min, sub, mul, add, select, randEuint64,      eq, gt, makePubliclyDecryptable, asEaddress, asEuint64, allowTransient, and.

params.orderId: The ID of the order to cancel

params._paymentToken: The ERC20 token address used for escrow (e.g., USDC)

createOrder(bytes32,bytes,bytes32,bytes,.details: The maker must have approved this contract to spend `depositAmount` of paymentToken.      Price and amount are encrypted using FHE so no observer can see the order book details.      FHE operations: fromExternal (x2), allowThis (x3), allow (x2), asEaddress

params.amountProof: ZK proof for the encrypted amount
params.depositAmount: The plaintext amount of ERC20 tokens to escrow
params.isBuy: Whether this is a buy or sell order
params.priceProof: ZK proof for the encrypted price

returns.orderId: The ID of the newly created order

fillOrder(uint256,bytes32,bytes,bytes32,.details: This is the core dark pool matching engine. The function is split across      internal helpers to avoid stack-too-deep. See _computeFill and _recordFill.      FHE operations used (14 total):        1. FHE.ge        - Encrypted price comparison        2. FHE.min       - Partial fill calculation        3. FHE.asEuint64 - Create encrypted zero constant        4. FHE.select    - Conditional fill (encrypted ternary)        5. FHE.mul       - Encrypted settlement total        6. FHE.sub       - Update remaining quantity        7. FHE.select    - Conditional remaining update        8. FHE.eq        - Check if fully filled        9. FHE.gt        - Check if fill is positive       10. FHE.and       - Compound boolean logic       11. FHE.randEuint64 - Fair tiebreaking randomness       12. FHE.asEaddress  - Encrypt taker counterparty       13. FHE.add         - Accumulate protocol volume       14. FHE.makePubliclyDecryptable - Post-trade transparency       +   FHE.allowTransient - Gas-optimized transient ACL

params.orderId: The order to grant access for
params.viewer: The address to grant view access to

params.orderId: The order to grant auditor access to

devdoc.title: ConfidentialOTC - Confidential Dark Pool with Deep FHE Usage

SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

AccessGranted(uint256,address).notice: Emitted when a maker grants view access to a third party

AuditorAccessGranted(uint256).notice: Emitted when auditor is granted access to an order

AuditorUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the auditor address is updated

FillVolumePublished(uint256).notice: Emitted when fill volume is made publicly decryptable

OrderCancelled(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when an order is cancelled and tokens refunded

OrderCreated(uint256,address,string,bool.notice: Emitted when a new order is created with token escrow

OrderFilled(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when an order is partially or fully filled

OwnershipTransferred(address,address).notice: Emitted when contract ownership is transferred

auditor().notice: Compliance auditor who can be granted access to any order/fill

cancelOrder(uint256).notice: Cancel an open order and refund the escrowed tokens to the maker

constructor.notice: Deploys the dark pool and sets the deployer as owner

createOrder(bytes32,bytes,bytes32,bytes,.notice: Create an OTC order with encrypted price and amount, depositing ERC20 tokens as escrow

fillCount().notice: Returns the total number of fills executed

fillOrder(uint256,bytes32,bytes,bytes32,.notice: Fill an open order with encrypted price matching and partial fill support

getEncryptedTaker(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted taker address handle for an order

getFill(uint256).notice: Get public fields of a fill

getFillAmount(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted fill amount handle

getFillEncryptedTaker(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted taker address from a fill

getFillPriorityScore(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted priority score for fair tiebreaking

getFillTotal(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted settlement total handle

getOrder(uint256).notice: Get public (non-encrypted) fields of an order

getOrderFills(uint256).notice: Get the list of fill IDs for a given order

getRemainingAmount(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted remaining amount handle

getTotalVolume().notice: Get the encrypted total protocol volume handle

grantAccess(uint256,address).notice: Maker grants a specific address permission to decrypt order fields

grantAuditorAccess(uint256).notice: Grant the auditor access to decrypt all fields of an order and its fills

orderCount().notice: Returns the total number of orders created

paymentToken().notice: ERC20 payment token used for escrow (e.g., USDC)

setAuditor(address).notice: Set the compliance auditor address (owner only)

userdoc.notice: A fully encrypted OTC dark pool where prices, amounts, and counterparties are         hidden using Fully Homomorphic Encryption. Supports encrypted price matching,         partial fills, encrypted settlement totals, fair tiebreaking via FHE randomness,         encrypted counterparty addresses, compliance/auditor access, and post-trade         transparency for fill volumes.
